# 23Hours

A specialty sports apparel brand focused on unique basketball and football jerseys. The brand revolves around the culture and passion of sports fans, offering distinctive jersey designs that stand out from standard merchandise. The vibe is energetic, athletic, and fan-driven, with a strong connection to sports culture and team spirit.

Source: https://23hours-4b41fa43.zappy5.app

---

## Gear Up with Team Sports Apparel — 23Hours

URL: https://23hours-4b41fa43.zappy5.app
Description: Unleash your team spirit with 23Hours&#39; bold basketball and football jerseys. Stand out with fan-driven designs that fuel your passion. Shop now and rep your squad!

Gear Up with Team Sports Apparel — 23Hours

Exclusive Jerseys


# Fuel the Passion.Wear the Game.


### Unique basketball and football jerseys inspired by sports culture, team pride, and street-level energy. Stand out from the crowd with designs that speak to true fans.


Get Your Jersey
Explore Collection













## Jerseys With Real Personality



23Hours creates distinctive team sports apparel for fans who want more than standard merchandise. Every jersey is built with premium details and a design language rooted in basketball and football culture.











### Distinctive Design Language


Our jerseys break away from generic templates with bold graphic compositions, custom typography, and color stories that celebrate team identity in a fresh, modern way.









### Premium Fan Culture Identity


We embed the energy of the stands, the rhythm of the game, and the pride of the community into every stitch. This is sports and apparel crafted for true believers.









### Matchday, Campus & Streetwear


Designed for versatility, our pieces transition seamlessly from the arena to the classroom to the city. Layer them, style them, and wear your passion anywhere.
















## Jerseys That Speak Louder Than The Scoreboard



We bridge basketball swagger and football grit into limited-run pieces that feel like collector's items. Every stitch, every graphic — built for the fans who treat game day as a runway.





- ### 🏀 Court-Ready Cuts Breathable mesh, dropped armholes, and silhouettes that move with you — from the paint to the bleachers.

- ### ⚽ Terrace DNA Bold crests, contrast collars, and supporter-culture detailing that turns a jersey into a statement.

- ### ✨ Drop Culture Small batches, exclusive colorways, and a fresh identity for fans who never settle for mass-market merch.



































## Built for the Culture, Worn with Pride


23Hours delivers distinctive team sports apparel designed for passionate fans who want to stand out. Every piece is a statement of identity, style, and the relentless energy of basketball and football culture.










### Stand Out from the Crowd


Forget standard merchandise. Our jerseys are designed to break the mold with unique graphics and bold colorways that turn heads on matchday and beyond.








### Represent Your Identity


Your jersey is your flag. We create apparel that captures the spirit of your team and your personal style, letting you wear your fandom with authenticity.








### Beyond Game Day


These aren't just jerseys for the stands. With premium fabrics and tailored cuts, our apparel transitions seamlessly into your everyday streetwear rotation.








### Connect with the Energy


Feel the pulse of the court and the pitch. Our designs channel the raw adrenaline of sports culture, connecting you to the game's heartbeat wherever you go.
















## Voices from the Stands


Real fans, real style. Hear why the 23Hours community chooses our unique team sports apparel to stand out and rep their passion.












The quality and design of 23Hours jerseys are unmatched. Wearing their gear to the game feels like being part of an exclusive club. It's not just apparel; it's a statement of true fan culture.




### Marcus J.


College Basketball Supporter











Finally, a brand that understands the intersection of streetwear and sports. The fits are perfect and the designs always spark conversations.




### Dani R.


Streetwear Enthusiast











As a football fanatic, I need gear that can keep up with my energy. 23Hours delivers on durability and style. Easily my go-to for matchday fits.




### Leo T.


Urban Fitness Coach
















## Fueling the Next Generation of Team Sports Apparel


More than just a brand — 23Hours is a movement built by fans, for fans. We're redefining what it means to wear your passion, with unique jersey concepts that turn heads on the court, on the field, and in the stands.




1,200+

### Unique Jersey Concepts


Every design is a fresh take on team spirit, blending basketball and football culture into wearable art.



85K

### Fan Community & Growing


A thriving community of athletes, collectors, and supporters who demand more from their sports and apparel.



30+

### Sports Inspirations


From hardwood classics to gridiron grit, our designs pull from the moments that define the game.



98%

### Audience Relevance


Connecting deeply across basketball, football, campus life, and fitness culture with every drop.














## Join the 23Hours Movement



We craft standout basketball and football jerseys for true fans. Whether you're looking to elevate your team's identity, collaborate on a custom design, or simply want to rep your passion with premium team sports apparel, we're here to make it happen.


From the court to the street, our gear is built for those who live the game. Ready to stand out? Drop us a message.


Let's create something legendary.

## Privacy Policy

Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

- Features

Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/22/2026



23Hours ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: 23Hours

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

- Features

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 22, 2026



23Hours is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: 23Hours

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 22, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - 23Hours

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Sports Apparel provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


23Hours provides Sports Apparel through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by 23Hours. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: 23Hours

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
